entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Zea mays L., the crop used for the genetic map development

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction fragment length polymorphisms used as markers for mapping

entities.name: IMMORTALIZED F2 POPULATION
entities.description: A mapping population (Tx303 X C0159 FP) that allows for unlimited marker mapping

entities.name: GENOMIC CLONES
entities.description: A type of marker consisting of 159 clones used in the map

entities.name: ISOZYMES
entities.description: A type of marker consisting of 16 isozymes used in the map

entities.name: CLONED GENES
entities.description: A type of marker consisting of 35 cloned genes of defined function

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: The 10 structures on which the markers were placed

entities.name: CLASSICAL MAIZE GENETIC MAP
entities.description: The reference genetic map used for alignment with cloned genes and isozymes

entities.name: U.S. CORN BELT
entities.description: The geographic region from which the germplasm collection was sourced

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The collection of maize genetic resources screened against RFLP probes

entities.name: ECORI
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used to screen RFLP probes

entities.name: HINDIII
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used to screen RFLP probes

entities.name: ECORV
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used to screen RFLP probes

entities.name: CORE MARKERS
entities.description: A set of 97 markers defined to serve as a backbone for genetic information

entities.name: BINS
entities.description: Subdivisions of the maize genome created using core markers

entities.name: MAIZE GENOME
entities.description: The complete genetic material of maize subdivided into bins
